'''wolavaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:oikish|oikish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-l-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oikish|oikish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wolavaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wolavithi|wolavithi]] || [[word:wolaviji|wolaviji]] || [[word:wolavishi|wolavishi]] || [[word:wolaviki|wolaviki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wolavuthuthu|wolavuthuthu]] || [[word:wolavujuju|wolavujuju]] || [[word:wolavushushu|wolavushushu]] || [[word:wolavukuku|wolavukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wolavuthu|wolavuthu]] || [[word:wolavuju|wolavuju]] || [[word:wolavushu|wolavushu]] || [[word:wolavuku|wolavuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wolavufthuf|wolavufthuf]] || [[word:wolavufjuf|wolavufjuf]] || [[word:wolavufshuf|wolavufshuf]] || [[word:wolavufkuf|wolavufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wolavethe|wolavethe]] || [[word:wolaveje|wolaveje]] || [[word:wolaveshe|wolaveshe]] || [[word:wolaveke|wolaveke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wolavothotho|wolavothotho]] || [[word:wolavojojo|wolavojojo]] || [[word:wolavoshosho|wolavoshosho]] || [[word:wolavokoko|wolavokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wolavotho|wolavotho]] || [[word:wolavojo|wolavojo]] || [[word:wolavosho|wolavosho]] || [[word:wolavoko|wolavoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wolavofthof|wolavofthof]] || [[word:wolavofjof|wolavofjof]] || [[word:wolavofshof|wolavofshof]] || [[word:wolavofkof|wolavofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:wolavÃŸfthÃŸf|wolavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wolavÃŸfjÃŸf|wolavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wolavÃŸfshÃŸf|wolavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wolavÃŸfkÃŸf|wolavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:wolavÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|wolavÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wolavÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|wolavÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wolavÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|wolavÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wolavÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|wolavÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:wolavÃŸfthÃŸf|wolavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wolavÃŸfjÃŸf|wolavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wolavÃŸfshÃŸf|wolavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wolavÃŸfkÃŸf|wolavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:wolavÃŸfthÃŸf|wolavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wolavÃŸfjÃŸf|wolavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wolavÃŸfshÃŸf|wolavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wolavÃŸfkÃŸf|wolavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wolavÃḊthÃḊ|wolavÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:wolavÃḊjÃḊ|wolavÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:wolavÃḊshÃḊ|wolavÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:wolavÃḊkÃḊ|wolavÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wolavathatha|wolavathatha]] || [[word:wolavajaja|wolavajaja]] || [[word:wolavashasha|wolavashasha]] || [[word:wolavakaka|wolavakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wolavatha|wolavatha]] || [[word:wolavaja|wolavaja]] || [[word:wolavasha|wolavasha]] || [[word:wolavaka|wolavaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wolavafthaf|wolavafthaf]] || [[word:wolavafjaf|wolavafjaf]] || [[word:wolavafshaf|wolavafshaf]] || [[word:wolavafkaf|wolavafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:wolavasha|wolavasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:wolavshÃḋsha|wolavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wolavrosha|wolavrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wolavmusha|wolavmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:wolavyasha|wolavyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowolavnkshÃḋsha|gowolavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowolavnkrosha|gowolavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowolavnkmusha|gowolavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowolavnkyasha|gowolavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:wolalavasha|wolalavasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wolalavshÃḋsha|wolalavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wolalavrosha|wolalavrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wolalavmusha|wolalavmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wolalavyasha|wolalavyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowolalavnkshÃḋsha|gowolalavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowolalavnkrosha|gowolalavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowolalavnkmusha|gowolalavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowolalavnkyasha|gowolalavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:welÃḊvasha|welÃḊvasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:welÃḊvshÃḋsha|welÃḊvshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:welÃḊvrosha|welÃḊvrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:welÃḊvmusha|welÃḊvmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:welÃḊvyasha|welÃḊvyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowelÃḊvnkshÃḋsha|gowelÃḊvnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowelÃḊvnkrosha|gowelÃḊvnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowelÃḊvnkmusha|gowelÃḊvnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowelÃḊvnkyasha|gowelÃḊvnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:wolfavasha|wolfavasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wolfavshÃḋsha|wolfavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wolfavrosha|wolfavrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wolfavmusha|wolfavmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wolfavyasha|wolfavyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowolfavnkshÃḋsha|gowolfavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowolfavnkrosha|gowolfavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowolfavnkmusha|gowolfavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowolfavnkyasha|gowolfavnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
